block_01: With this email, we confirm that the legal relationship between our company and you under the Affiliate Agreement has been terminated on or about the date of this email.
block_02: The termination took place upon the conditions you have agreed, accepted and consented to through your IQ Option Affiliate Account. A summary of the conditions is stated below:
block_03: Your affiliate account at IQ Option Affiliate Program was blocked/closed and cannot be accessed as of this date.
block_04: You freely and unequivocally consented to the following:
block_07: your entire account history, data, past commission payments, fee balance, transactions, account credentials, statistical data, cookies, referrals, chat history, any and all personal data, etc (Data) which was disclosed to us or developed during our legal relationship and was linked to your Account (Disclosure), and
block_08: That Disclosure is done only for the purpose of (i) requesting Affstore on your behalf to open an Affstore Account in your name and with the full Data, and (ii) assigning/novating the obligation to pay any commission/payout balance that appeared in your affiliate account to Affstore so that IQOption LLC will not be responsible, obligated or liable to pay it to you (Balance) (collectively (i) and (ii) the Purpose),
block_09: You have acknowledged and accepted that any Balance is not final and is subject to checks by Affstore which may lead to the application of reductions and to the payment of a lesser amount, and
block_10: You have waived any right to any current or future (real or contingent) claim against IQOption LLC under the Affiliate Agreement.
block_11: Thank you for having been part of the IQ Option Affiliate Program. We can't wait to see you in Affstore!
